description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named build-docker that runs in the build stage using the docker:git image and the docker:dind service. The job should run only for tag pipelines. In before_script log in to the GitLab Container Registry with docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY. In script export IQ_VERSION=${CI_BUILD_TAG%%-*}, export IMAGE_TAG=$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$IQ_VERSION, export IMAGE_LATEST_TAG=$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest, then build the image with docker build --tag $IMAGE_TAG --build-arg IQ_VERSION=${IQ_VERSION} ., tag it as latest with docker tag $IMAGE_TAG $IMAGE_LATEST_TAG, and push both tags to the registry using docker push $IMAGE_TAG and docker push $IMAGE_LATEST_TAG.
